message:
chore(beads): add ft-3681t NTM convergence program with 8 child epics

Create ft-3681t program: Native FrankenTerm Convergence (NTM Superset +
Connector Fabric) with child epics covering capability extraction, native
mux supersystem, swarm orchestration, robot API, flywheel connector
fabric integration, policy/security/governance, observability/scale
hardening, and migration/cutover/adoption.

Update ft-1memj.16 (macOS bundle) with mux-server bundling note and
ft-1memj.32 (asupersync validation) with ft-2ojrv dependency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
